caption: cyRespond to a property possession claim
heading: cyPayments or agreements since the claim was made
paragraph1: cyYou will now be asked questions about any payments your client has made, or agreements they have entered into, since Treetop Housing made their claim.
paragraph2: cyThis will help a judge understand:
paragraph3: cyThe claimant will be able to see the answers you provide.
paragraph4: cyIf your client has paid some or all of the money they owe, you should bring proof of this to the hearing.
bullet1: cyWhether any arrangements have already been made to pay off the money your client owes in rent payments (rent arrears)
bullet2: cyWhether your client has paid some or all of the money they owe
